title: Skill Routing Config
description: Binding shape for the skill-injector routing config consumed by agent-orchestration/hooks/skill-injector.py and scripts/skill/skill-router.js. Authored 2026-05-25 as the project-owned half of the ADR-0016 surface #4 resolution (the 'project owns the type, workspace owns the instance' split): the instance file lives at agent-orchestration/references/skill-routing-config.json because the consumers are cross-project (the skill-injector hook is workspace orchestration), but the SHAPE the file must satisfy is project-owned and lives here. Provenance: D2 in .roundtable/skill-graph-restructure-review-2026-05-25/merged-review.md.

_doc.description: Free-form documentation block. Authors use either a string or a numbered-key object holding paragraph chunks. The shape is intentionally permissive — only the routing tables are normatively constrained.

universalSkills.description: Skills the injector ALWAYS includes regardless of label/keyword match. Use sparingly — every universal skill consumes a slot in the per-model injection_cap.

additionalProperties.description: An alias's value may be a skill name OR (for the _doc key) a description string.

skillAliases.description: Legacy / synonym names that should resolve to an existing skill without rewriting every historical label/keyword entry at once. Key = alias; value = canonical skill name.

injection_caps.description: Model-aware injection caps (SH-5013). Max primary skills injected per model — lower-context models get fewer. Integer values are caps; the `_doc` key holds a description string. Known model keys: opus / sonnet / haiku / flash / gpt-5.4 / gemini / minimax / nemotron.

modelLabels.description: Display names for the agent models the router knows about. Stable order; UI surfaces index into this array.

labelMap.description: Map from Linear task labels (or other tag systems) to the skills that should be injected when the label is present. Key = label string; value = array of skill names.

keywordMap.description: Map from trigger keywords / phrases (slash commands, common natural-language phrases) to skills. Key = keyword (may contain spaces / slashes); value = array of skill names.

bundleTypes.description: Map from bundle-trigger keyword to bundle category. `workflow-bundle` triggers the full sequenced workflow; `routing-bundle` triggers a routing-only group. Key = keyword; value = category.

bundles.description: Map from bundle name to the source skills that compose it. Key = bundle name (must align with a `bundleTypes` entry or be referenceable from `labelMap`/`keywordMap`); value = array of skill names.

compositeBundles.description: Composite skill bundles (SH-5014). When a task matches a triggerKeyword, the bundle's SKILL.md is injected INSTEAD of the individual `replaces` skills. The `_doc` key holds a description string; every other key is a composite-bundle name.

skill_name.description: Kebab-case skill name. Must resolve to an existing SKILL.md under the workspace skills/ tree (or be the alias source). Validated by scripts/skill/skill-router.js + the manifest census.

path.description: Path to the composite bundle's SKILL.md, e.g. `skills/_bundles/<bundle-name>/SKILL.md`.

replaces.description: Source skills the composite bundle subsumes. When the bundle injects, these are skipped to avoid double-load.

triggerKeywords.description: Keywords / phrases that select this composite over the individual source skills.
